convert-xml-to-pdf-default-xslt.title: Convert XML to PDF with Default XSLT Transformation
convert-xml-to-pdf-default-xslt.description: Shows how to load an XML file and generate a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's default XSLT transformation without providing a custom stylesheet.

create-pdf-from-xml.title: Create PDF from XML in Memory Stream
create-pdf-from-xml.description: Demonstrates loading XML content from a memory stream using BindXml and saving it as a PDF with default settings.

apply-xslt-to-xml-and-convert-to-pdf.title: Apply XSLT to XML and Convert to PDF
apply-xslt-to-xml-and-convert-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load an XML file with an XSLT stylesheet applied using Aspose.Pdf, and then save the transformed content as a PDF document.

validate-xml-xsd-generate-pdf.title: Validate XML with XSD and Generate PDF
validate-xml-xsd-generate-pdf.description: The example validates an XML file against an XSD schema and, if successful, loads the XML into an Aspose.Pdf Document to create a PDF file. It demonstrates error handling for validation and basic PDF creation.

set-pdf-page-size-from-xml.title: Set PDF Page Size from XML
set-pdf-page-size-from-xml.description: Shows how to read page width and height values from an XML file and apply them to the corresponding pages of an Aspose.Pdf document.

set-pdf-page-orientation-from-xml.title: Set PDF Page Orientation from XML
set-pdf-page-orientation-from-xml.description: Shows how to read an XML layout file, set each PDF page's orientation (landscape or portrait) accordingly, and add a label indicating the orientation.

set-custom-page-margins-from-xml.title: Set Custom Page Margins from XML
set-custom-page-margins-from-xml.description: Demonstrates how to read margin values defined per section in an XML file and apply them to specific pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-automatic-page-numbers-into-pdf.title: Insert Automatic Page Numbers into PDF from XML
insert-automatic-page-numbers-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading an XML document with XSLT/FO, generating a PDF, and adding sequential page numbers to each page using Aspose.Pdf classes.

generate-pdf-table-from-xml.title: Generate PDF Table from XML Data
generate-pdf-table-from-xml.description: Shows how to read tabular data from an XML file into a DataSet and create a PDF document containing a table using Aspose.Pdf.

render-cdata-into-pdf.title: Render XML CDATA Sections into a PDF
render-cdata-into-pdf.description: Loads an XML file, extracts all CDATA nodes, and writes each CDATA value as formatted text into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-custom-font-to-xml-elements.title: Apply Custom Font to Specific XML Elements in PDF
apply-custom-font-to-xml-elements.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file into a PDF, locating specific text fragments, and applying a custom font (e.g., Arial) to those fragments before saving the document.

embed-custom-truetype-font-into-pdf-from.title: Embed Custom TrueType Font into PDF from XML
embed-custom-truetype-font-into-pdf-from.description: Demonstrates how to load XML into a PDF document and embed a custom TrueType font so the resulting PDF displays the text correctly on any system.

generate-pdf-from-xml-with-external-css.title: Generate PDF from XML with External CSS via XSLT
generate-pdf-from-xml-with-external-css.description: Shows how to bind an XML document with an XSL stylesheet that references external CSS and produce a styled PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-custom-color-scheme-to-pdf-xml.title: Apply Custom Color Scheme to PDF via XML Styles
apply-custom-color-scheme-to-pdf-xml.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file containing style definitions with XmlLoadOptions and converting it to a PDF where the defined colors are applied.

apply-custom-background-color-to-pdf-pag.title: Apply Custom Background Color to PDF Pages
apply-custom-background-color-to-pdf-pag.description: Shows how to parse an XML color string and set it as the background color for each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-header-footer-xml.title: Add Header and Footer Using XML Templates
add-header-footer-xml.description: Creates a PDF, defines header and footer via an XML template, binds it to the document, and updates pagination placeholders.

add-custom-page-borders-to-pdf.title: Add Custom Page Borders to PDF Pages
add-custom-page-borders-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, iterate through its pages, and draw a rectangular border on each page using Aspose.Pdf's Graph and drawing classes, then save the modified document.

apply-page-backgrounds-from-xml.title: Apply Page‑Specific Background Images from XML to a PDF
apply-page-backgrounds-from-xml.description: Shows how to read an XML configuration and attach image backgrounds to designated PDF pages using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-dynamic-headers-using-xml.title: Insert Dynamic Headers into PDF Using XML Data
insert-dynamic-headers-using-xml.description: Demonstrates how to read per‑page header text from an XML file and add it as a dynamic header to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf event handling.

insert-footnotes-into-pdf-from-xml.title: Insert Footnotes into PDF Pages from XML
insert-footnotes-into-pdf-from-xml.description: Shows how to load footnote definitions from an XML file and attach them as footnotes to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-conditional-page-breaks-based-on-.title: Insert Conditional Page Breaks in PDF Based on XML Length
insert-conditional-page-breaks-based-on-.description: Shows how to load XML into a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, calculate the accumulated text length, and insert blank pages when a character threshold is exceeded.

generate-pdf-toc-from-xml.title: Generate PDF Table of Contents from XML Headings
generate-pdf-toc-from-xml.description: Shows how to create a PDF table of contents by reading heading data from an XML file and using Aspose.Pdf's tagged content API to build TOC elements.

create-hierarchical-pdf-outline-from-xml.title: Create Hierarchical PDF Outline from XML
create-hierarchical-pdf-outline-from-xml.description: Shows how to build a nested bookmark outline in a PDF by recursively traversing an XML hierarchy and assigning each node a destination page using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-outline-from-xml.title: Create PDF Outline Entries from XML Sections
create-pdf-outline-from-xml.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file with section titles and page numbers, then adding corresponding outline (bookmark) entries to an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

pdf-outline-from-xml.title: Create PDF Outline Hierarchy from XML Nesting
pdf-outline-from-xml.description: Demonstrates building a PDF outline hierarchy that mirrors the nesting levels of an XML document for detailed navigation.

set-page-transition-duration-from-xml.title: Set Page Transition Duration from XML
set-page-transition-duration-from-xml.description: Shows how to load an XML file, convert it to a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, read per‑page duration values from the XML and apply those values to the PDF pages' transition duration.

generate-pdf-from-xml-fullscreen.title: Generate PDF from XML with Full‑Screen Viewer Mode
generate-pdf-from-xml-fullscreen.description: Shows how to convert an XML file to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and set the document to open in full‑screen mode, specifying a non‑full‑screen page mode after exit.

generate-pdf-from-xml-version-1-7.title: Generate PDF from XML with PDF version 1.7
generate-pdf-from-xml-version-1-7.description: Shows how to create a PDF document from an XML file using Aspose.Pdf and set the PDF version to 1.7 via the Document.Convert method.

set-pdf-permissions-restrict-printing-co.title: Set PDF Permissions to Restrict Printing and Copying
set-pdf-permissions-restrict-printing-co.description: Shows how to load an XML file into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, apply AES‑256 encryption, and set permissions that disable printing and content extraction before saving the document.

encrypt-pdf-from-xml.title: Encrypt PDF from XML with Password Protection
encrypt-pdf-from-xml.description: Shows how to load an XML file, convert it to a PDF, and apply password protection with specific permissions using Aspose.Pdf.

digitally-sign-pdf-from-xml.title: Digitally Sign PDF Generated from XML
digitally-sign-pdf-from-xml.description: Shows how to bind an XML file to a PDF, add a visible signature field, and apply a digital signature using a PFX certificate with Aspose.Pdf.

encrypt-pdf-from-xml-aes256.title: Encrypt PDF Generated from XML with AES‑256
encrypt-pdf-from-xml-aes256.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file, converting it to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, applying print and extraction permissions, encrypting the document with AES‑256, and saving the protected PDF.

compress-pdf-streams-from-xml.title: Compress PDF Streams Generated from XML
compress-pdf-streams-from-xml.description: Shows how to create a PDF from an XML file with Aspose.Pdf and then apply stream compression to reduce the resulting file size.

compress-pdf-flate-xml.title: Compress PDF with Flate Compression via XML Conversion
compress-pdf-flate-xml.description: Demonstrates how to reduce PDF size by exporting the document to XML, reloading it, and applying Flate compression to all objects using Aspose.Pdf optimization features.

compress-pdf-text-streams-from-xml.title: Compress PDF Text Streams from XML using Aspose.Pdf Optimization
compress-pdf-text-streams-from-xml.description: Shows how to load XML into a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf and apply optimization to compress objects, including text streams, reducing the PDF size.

downsample-images-optimize-pdf-from-xml.title: Downsample Images and Optimize PDF from XML
downsample-images-optimize-pdf-from-xml.description: The example loads PDF content defined in an XML file, applies image down‑sampling and other optimization settings, and saves an optimized PDF.

set-image-resolution-for-exported-pdf-im.title: Set Image Resolution for Exported PDF Images
set-image-resolution-for-exported-pdf-im.description: Shows how to bind an XML file to a PDF document, configure the DPI of raster images, and export the PDF to HTML using Aspose.Pdf.

embed-base64-images-xml-to-pdf.title: Embed Base64 Images from XML into PDF
embed-base64-images-xml-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load an XML file, decode Base64‑encoded image data, and place each image on a separate page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

embed-svg-from-xml-into-pdf.title: Embed SVG Images from XML into PDF as Vector Graphics
embed-svg-from-xml-into-pdf.description: Shows how to load SVG fragments from an XML file and insert them as vector graphics into a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

render-html-cdata-to-pdf.title: Render HTML CDATA Sections to PDF
render-html-cdata-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load an XML file, extract HTML fragments from CDATA sections, and embed them into a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

generate-qr-codes-from-xml-to-pdf.title: Generate QR Codes from XML and Insert into PDF Pages
generate-qr-codes-from-xml-to-pdf.description: The example reads <Code> values from an XML file, creates QR‑code images, and places each image on successive pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

create-barcodes-from-xml.title: Create Barcodes in PDF from XML Data
create-barcodes-from-xml.description: Demonstrates loading XML data, parsing barcode values, and generating Code128 barcodes on a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's BarcodeField.

embed-video-annotations-from-xml.title: Embed Video Annotations from XML into PDF
embed-video-annotations-from-xml.description: Shows how to parse an XML file that defines video files and their placement, then embed those videos as MovieAnnotation objects into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

embed-audio-annotations-from-xml.title: Embed Audio Annotations from XML into PDF
embed-audio-annotations-from-xml.description: Loads an XML file that describes audio clips and adds corresponding sound annotations to the specified pages of a PDF, then saves the result.

embed-3d-models-from-xml-into-pdf.title: Embed 3D Models from XML into PDF as Interactive Annotations
embed-3d-models-from-xml-into-pdf.description: Shows how to read an XML file that references 3D model files and embed each model as a PDF3DAnnotation in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-form-fields-from-xml.title: Create PDF Form Fields from XML and Set Default Values
create-pdf-form-fields-from-xml.description: Demonstrates how to define XFA form fields in an XML document, assign them to a PDF, and set default values.

populate-pdf-form-from-xml.title: Populate PDF Form Fields from XML Records
populate-pdf-form-from-xml.description: Shows how to fill AcroForm or XFA PDF forms with data extracted from an XML file, generating a separate filled PDF for each record.

extract-plain-text-from-pdf.title: Extract Plain Text from PDF for Indexing
extract-plain-text-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF generated from XML, extracting its plain text using Aspose.Pdf's TextAbsorber with pure formatting, and saving the result for indexing.

export-pdf-pages-to-bmp-from-xml.title: Export PDF Pages as BMP Images from XML
export-pdf-pages-to-bmp-from-xml.description: Loads an XML file, binds it to an Aspose.Pdf Document to generate a PDF, and then saves each PDF page as a separate BMP image file.

convert-pdf-pages-to-high-res-png-thumbn.title: Convert PDF Pages to High-Resolution PNG Thumbnails
convert-pdf-pages-to-high-res-png-thumbn.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, and save each page as a high‑resolution PNG image for thumbnail creation.

generate-pdf-thumbnail-from-xml.title: Generate PNG Thumbnail from XML‑derived PDF
generate-pdf-thumbnail-from-xml.description: The example loads an XML file, converts it to a PDF document in memory using Aspose.Pdf, and creates a PNG thumbnail of the first PDF page.

batch-convert-xml-to-pdf.title: Batch Convert XML Files to PDF
batch-convert-xml-to-pdf.description: Shows how to iterate through a folder of XML files and convert each one into a separate PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's XML load options.

merge-pdfs-from-xml.title: Merge PDFs Generated from XML Files
merge-pdfs-from-xml.description: Shows how to load XML files as PDF documents using Aspose.Pdf and merge them into a single PDF file.

split-pdf-xml-into-chapter-pdfs.title: Split PDF Generated from XML into Chapter PDFs
split-pdf-xml-into-chapter-pdfs.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file as a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, then iterating through its pages and saving each page as a separate chapter PDF file.

paginate-xml-to-separate-pdf-pages.title: Paginate XML to Separate PDF Pages with Footers
paginate-xml-to-separate-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file into an Aspose.Pdf Document, splitting each page into its own PDF file, and adding a sequential footer to each page.

repeat-table-header-rows.title: Repeat Table Header Rows on Each PDF Page
repeat-table-header-rows.description: Demonstrates how to create a table with a repeating header row that appears on every page when the table spans multiple PDF pages using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-pdfa-2b-compliance-after-xml-to.title: Validate PDF/A-2b Compliance After XML to PDF Conversion
validate-pdfa-2b-compliance-after-xml-to.description: Shows how to load an XML file, convert it to a PDF/A‑2b document, save the PDF, and validate the PDF/A‑2b compliance using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-pdf-xml-representation.title: Extract PDF Internal XML Representation
extract-pdf-xml-representation.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and exporting its internal XML representation to a file.

convert-xml-to-html-preview.title: Convert XML to HTML Preview using Aspose.Pdf
convert-xml-to-html-preview.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file into an Aspose.Pdf Document and saving it as an HTML file for web preview.

log-pdf-generation-xml.title: Log PDF Generation Steps and Errors for XML Files
log-pdf-generation-xml.description: Creates sample XML files, converts each to PDF using Aspose.Pdf, validates the PDF, and logs detailed steps and any errors to the console.

convert-xml-to-pdf-with-warning-handling.title: Convert XML to PDF with Warning Handling and Exception Management
convert-xml-to-pdf-with-warning-handling.description: Demonstrates converting an XML file to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf with XmlLoadOptions, a custom warning callback, and comprehensive exception handling for conversion and PDF errors.

generate-pdf-from-xslfo-with-warning-han.title: Generate PDF from XSL‑FO with Custom Warning Handler
generate-pdf-from-xslfo-with-warning-han.description: Loads an XSL‑FO file, sets up a custom warning handler to capture parsing warnings, and generates a PDF while handling errors gracefully.

thread-safe-xml-to-pdf-batch-converter.title: Thread‑Safe Batch Conversion of XML to PDF
thread-safe-xml-to-pdf-batch-converter.description: Shows how to convert multiple XML files to PDF concurrently using Aspose.Pdf, ensuring each Document instance is created, used, and disposed within its own thread.

register-pdf-generation-service-di.title: Register PDF Generation Service with Dependency Injection
register-pdf-generation-service-di.description: Shows how to add a PdfOutputGenerator as a singleton to the IServiceCollection and expose it through the IFileOutputGenerator interface for reuse across the application.

xml-to-pdf-conversion-with-xslt.title: XML to PDF Conversion with XSLT
xml-to-pdf-conversion-with-xslt.description: Demonstrates converting XML data to PDF by applying XSLT transformations using Aspose.Pdf's XSL‑FO conversion capabilities.

profile-batch-xml-to-pdf-conversion.title: Profile Batch XML to PDF Conversion with Aspose.Pdf
profile-batch-xml-to-pdf-conversion.description: Demonstrates how to convert multiple XML files to PDF using Aspose.Pdf while measuring load and save performance with Stopwatch.

pdf-generation-with-retry-logic.title: PDF Generation with Retry Logic for Transient I/O Errors
pdf-generation-with-retry-logic.description: Creates a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, adds a text fragment, and saves the file while implementing retry logic for transient I/O and platform‑specific GDI+ issues.

generate-pdf-from-xsl-fo-config.title: Generate PDF from XSL-FO using a JSON configuration
generate-pdf-from-xsl-fo-config.description: Demonstrates loading XSL-FO file paths from a JSON config and using Aspose.Pdf to convert the XSL-FO document to a PDF file.

transform-xml-multiple-namespaces-to-pdf.title: Transform XML with Multiple Namespaces to PDF using XSLT
transform-xml-multiple-namespaces-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file, applying an XSLT stylesheet that handles multiple namespaces, and saving the transformed result as a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-page-size-from-xml-pi.title: Set PDF Page Size Using XML Processing Instruction
set-pdf-page-size-from-xml-pi.description: Demonstrates how to read a custom processing instruction from an XML file to obtain page dimensions, load the XML into a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, and apply the specified size to all pages before saving.

generate-pdf-from-xml-xsl-fo.title: Generate PDF from XML using XSL‑FO with Aspose.Pdf
generate-pdf-from-xml-xsl-fo.description: Demonstrates how to load an XML file and an XSL‑FO template with Aspose.Pdf, apply the transformation, and save the result as a PDF.

apply-distinct-page-margins.title: Apply Distinct Page Margins per Section
apply-distinct-page-margins.description: Demonstrates loading an HTML file into a PDF and assigning different margin values to specific page ranges using Aspose.Pdf's MarginInfo and PageInfo.AnyMargin.

convert-xml-to-encrypted-pdf-aes256.title: Convert XML to Encrypted PDF with AES‑256
convert-xml-to-encrypted-pdf-aes256.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file, converting it to a PDF document, and applying AES‑256 encryption with specific permissions before saving the protected PDF.
